strategy: Join by round 2; arriving later triggers a 100,000 Moon Ship of Fools that wipes you.
He runs an escalating Equalize cycle capping your damage: 250, then 500, 1,000, 2,000, then Doom and Gloom, and finally a 100,000 Deer Knight every round that ends the fight. You have a hard timer.
With only 4,500 health, set up blades during the low-cap rounds and burst him during the 2,000-cap window (a few 2,000 hits clear him) before the doom phase.
Do not change the Global; it triggers a -70% Tower Shield plus two -85% Tower Shields on him (the -85% ones need Melt) and does not even remove the Equalize.
Stack your setup early, then unload the moment the cap allows a kill.
cheatNotes: Join after round 2 and he casts a 100,000 Moon Ship of Fools, a guaranteed wipe. Be on time.
He caps your damage at 250 early, so do not try to burst yet; just set up.
Then to 2,000; this is your kill window, and a couple of hits clear his 4,500 health.
After that he casts Doom and Gloom, cutting healing, so be past the kill by now.
Changing the Global makes him drop a -70% Tower Shield and two -85% Tower Shields on himself without removing the Equalize. Do not touch the Global.
Those -85% Tower Shields can each be removed with Melt if you are forced to deal with them.
His finisher is a 100,000 Moon Deer Knight every round, so kill him before this phase or you die.
